name: Mobile Client
commonFailureModes: Live Google OAuth is constrained by mobile redirect strategy; check apps/mobile/docs/adr before enabling providers.
Metro must start from apps/mobile for simulator verification.
Root pnpm test does not run the React Native/Jest harness; include test:rn for gate/chat behavior.
Launch state and auth adapters should stay under src/domains and shared providers seams.
reviewHints: Protocol changes should trigger Mobile chat and gate assumption review.
Provider/auth changes should inspect Identity Gate and launch-state fallback behavior.
